examples: His signature was just a squiggle but only he could make that squiggle.
A squiggle implies that you are too busy and disinterested in the letter.
Either way, the signal ends up looking like an erratic wavelike squiggle.
I'm looking at a squiggle of black lines and boxes on a small scrap of paper.
Declan Buckley said a "squiggle" referred to during Tuesday's proceedings was a bracket to provide an emphasis about four entries.
